mapper.sql: id, user_id, course_id, chapter_id, question_id, practice_mode, status, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_practice_session (user_id, course_id, chapter_id, question_id, practice_mode, status, deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{courseId}, #{chapterId}, #{questionId}, #{practiceMode}, #{status}, 0, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE chapter_id = #{chapterId}, question_id = #{questionId}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_practice_session SET chapter_id = #{chapterId}, question_id = #{questionId}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_practice_session WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND deleted = 0
